code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let first = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(body)
  mut count = 0
  for tok in tokens
    if tok == first
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
  Ok(())
end
